pageDescription: Create and manage your asynchronous AI processing pipelines.
detailPageDescription: Edit and run an AI workflow with the visual workflow builder.
workflowLoadFailedDescription: Refresh the page or return to the workflow list and try again.
noPrivateFlowsDesc: Create your first workflow to start building an automation pipeline.
renameIdentity: Use a clear name so this workflow is easy to find later.
deleteIdentity: This workflow and its saved definition will be permanently removed.
deleteWorkflowDialogDescription: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this workflow? This action cannot be undone.
